notes:
What's new in V3.1.5:
• Seedance 2 Reference — now supports audio reference
• Wan 2.7 Reference — now supports audio reference
• Fixed multi-image generation bug (nano banana)
• Fixed color accuracy on frame import — disable Display Color Management in Lumetri settings for best results
• Fixed hang when entering Seedance 2 reference mode
• Fixed drag & drop images taking over the panel

Also in V3.1.4 (if you're coming from an earlier version):
• Seedance 2 — ByteDance's newest-gen model: natural motion, stable subjects, footage that feels ready to cut
• Wan 2.7 — text-to-video, image-to-video, transition, video edit, and reference mode in one family
• Story Cutter — tighter instruction following (cut to script, complex briefs); multicam for stacked synced angles; new /batch for multiple edit tasks in one run
• Fixes — large-transcript crashes; faster outputs and better token efficiency; duplicate video tracks on insert; more reliable end-to-end listening to your instructions
